title: GameStop (GME) Q3 2024 Earnings Results
text: GameStop reported Q3 2024 earnings that presented a mixed performance. The company generated $860 million in revenue, missing the expectation of $888 million. However, the retailer delivered a positive surprise on profitability metrics. Contrary to projections, GameStop exceeded expectations on the bottom line. While analysts anticipated a loss of $0.06 per share, the company instead achieved $0.04 per share in earnings—a notable turnaround. The earnings announcement triggered a bullish market reaction. GameStop shares climbed significantly in after-hours trading, rising from a closing price of $26.95 to as high as $30.60. The earnings disclosure revealed that GameStop had 71 million directly registered shares as of December 4, 2024. Despite missing revenue targets, GameStops unexpected profitability and strong stock performance suggest investor confidence in the company's operational improvements and financial trajectory.
